message:
test(search): add 16 proptest serde roundtrips for regression diff types

New proptest file covering RegressionScenario, ScenarioOutcome,
DiffArtifact, ReplayGateConfig, ReplayGateVerdict, and SchemaGateResult
with serde roundtrip, Clone preservation, invariant checks (passed +
failed = outcomes.len(), pass_rate bounds), and JSON validity tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
